findings.evidence: grep of each name in TauCeti/ returns only its own definition line; card_pointSet_inter_swapColumns uses only the left_/right_notMem and left_ne_right variants.
findings.fix: Delete these three lemmas, or mark them `private` if needed only as scaffolding (they currently scaffold nothing).
findings.issue: GridState.swapColumns_left_notMem_pointSet_inter (L152), swapColumns_right_notMem_pointSet_inter (L160), and swapColumns_left_ne_right_pointSet (L174) are never used — not in this file, not in the repo. The downstream target consumes the GridRectangleBetween-level corner lemmas, which re-derive these facts directly from mem_pointSet_inter_iff.

findings.evidence: grep returns only the definition lines; card_pointSet_inter is proved by `simpa ... card_pointSet_inter_swapColumns` without them.
findings.fix: Make these `private` or remove them unless a named Lane G target needs the corner-distinctness fact at this level.
findings.issue: GridRectangleBetween.left_bottom_ne_right_top (L273) and left_top_ne_right_bottom (L296) are unused, not @[simp], and not in the module's `Main results` list. The only insert-card distinctness obligation (in card_pointSet_inter) is already discharged via the GridState lemma.

findings.evidence: Their only call sites are inside card_pointSet_inter_swapColumns in the same namespace; the rectangle-level corner facts are derived independently.
findings.issue: GridState.left_notMem_pointSet_inter_swapColumns, right_notMem_pointSet_inter_swapColumns, and left_ne_right_pointSet_swapColumns are public but serve only as internal steps of card_pointSet_inter_swapColumns; they are implementation helpers, not part of the surface the downstream Lane G arguments use (those use the GridRectangleBetween corner lemmas).

summary: The characteristic API (target/source_eq_swapColumns, mem_pointSet_inter_iff, source/target_pointSet_eq, card_pointSet_inter) is complete and well-annotated, but the file over-exposes a layer of corner/distinctness helper lemmas, several of which are dead public surface with no consumer.
